commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh For from Israel is even this: the workman made it; therefore it is not God: but the calf of Samaria shall be broken in pieces. This enhances the crime. Can a people so highly favoured adore the work of an artist. Webs, such as appear on a fine day in autumn. Jerome's master suggested that this was the sense. Interpreters vary. (Calmet) Septuagint and Theodotion, "is delusive. "Symmachus, "instable "shebabim. (Haydock) Some erroneously read v instead of i. "The Lord casts off the calves of heretics,. and wonders that people should prefer heretical filth before the cleanliness of the Church.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
